case_title: VIVIAN LEE RESPONDENT VS. ORIENT EXPRESS TRAVEL APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT ORIENT EXPRESS TRAVEL AS TO RESPONDENT LEE, VIVIAN HEARING SET FOR JAN-15-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT LEE, VIVIAN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ORIENT EXPRESS TRAVEL $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
